events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from CPMC Van Ness for client 1030. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: cardiovascular. Allergies: fish, peanut. Sodium ceiling 600 mg/meal, carbs 35–70 g/meal. Prefers Vietnamese; dislikes beef. Cooking ability: microwave. 7 meals/week, zone Sunset.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Fresh Spring Rolls with Chicken
Rejected: Canh Chua (Sour Fish Soup) with Rice
Matched: Steamed Rice Rolls with Mushrooms
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 423/600 mg ✓, carbs 46 g (target 35–70) ✓, no fish/peanut ✓.

events.title: Matched: Tofu and Vegetable Curry with Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 439/600 mg ✓, carbs 54 g (target 35–70) ✓, no fish/peanut ✓.

events.title: Matched: Lemongrass Chicken with Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 458/600 mg ✓, carbs 50 g (target 35–70) ✓, no fish/peanut ✓.

events.title: Route assigned
events.detail: Client 1030 added to route R-SUNS-1 (Sunset), delivery 2026-07-21, window 10:00–12:00. Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1030: 7 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 0. 0 hard-constraint violations.
